description: Configure 'Discard old builds' (Log Rotation) settings for three existing Jenkins jobs to manage disk space. For 'nightly-integration-tests', set the Log Rotation strategy to keep a maximum of 5 builds and 2 builds with artifacts. For 'feature-branch-builds', set the Log Rotation strategy to keep builds for 7 days. For 'release-pipeline', set the Log Rotation strategy to keep a maximum of 10 builds and 5 builds with artifacts. Ensure all other log rotation fields for these jobs are left blank. All jobs are already created and populated with build history.
